## Checklist for New Skills
<!-- Please check all that apply to ensure your PR meets the DevSkill Studio standards. -->
- [ ] I have verified this skill does not duplicate an existing one (see `LIBRARY.md`).
- [ ] I have created a new folder in `skills/` using `kebab-case`.
- [ ] I have included a `SKILL.md` file with the correct frontmatter (name, description, etc.).
- [ ] The prompt adopts a strict Persona and demands production-ready output.
- [ ] I have updated `LIBRARY.md` to document the new skill and its Invocation command.
